title: Night Lights
description: Night Lights adds a variety of modern lights and medieval lights to decorate and illuminate the world.
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/wi1Vyle.png)


Night Lights is a mod that adds more than 20
types of modern and functional lights to 
decorate and illuminate the Minecraft world.
With elegant designs and advanced technology, 
this mod is ideal for modern, urban and futuristic constructions.



# Features:

More than 20 Types of Lights: There are more than 10 different models, each with its dark version, providing variety for any construction.
Versatile Placement: The lights can be placed in any direction, on walls, ceilings and floors, adapting to any architectural design.
Underwater Lighting: All lights can be placed and work perfectly underwater, ideal for underwater bases or aquatic decorations.


## Interactive Lights:
You can turn any light on or off simply by clicking on it, without the need for a redstone.
![dasd](https://i.imgur.com/m1jCcYR.gif)


## Remote Control:
A special device allows several lights to be turned on and off at the same time within a certain radius, facilitating lighting management in large constructions.

![adsasd](https://i.imgur.com/s9VjUNT.gif)

## Wall Switch:
A wall switch that allows you to turn multiple devices on and off at once without the need for a redstone.

![dassad](https://i.imgur.com/osuGPMA.gif)

## Candle lighter:
With a lighter you can turn the candles on and off.

![sdasdaasd](https://i.imgur.com/PuC4TIF.gif)

## Use:
Ideal for decorating modern houses, cities, offices, factories, streets and any construction that needs advanced and stylized lighting.

![dasasd](https://i.imgur.com/UciE4Aa.gif)
![dasasd](https://i.imgur.com/Jhfb05v.png)
![https://i.imgur.com/TrwjUMO.png](https://i.imgur.com/TrwjUMO.png)
![https://i.imgur.com/BNydHDI.png](https://i.imgur.com/BNydHDI.png)
